meaning: n.玻璃装配业,玻璃窗,上釉,上光
examples: 'I'm feeling rather tired,' he said, his eyes glazing.
Buildings in Shanghai continue to spring up without loft insulation or double glazing.
Many people have already installed insulation and double-glazing, but more is to be done.
"I remember people screaming, crying, praying inside, " says the 83-year-old, his eyes occasionally glazing over.
Some parts are missing - the bomb bay doors, the cockpit glazing, the undercarriage doors.
